This schedule report maps GitClaw's reviewed GitHub Actions cron jobs to proactive issue threads. It adapts OpenClaw's exact cron-vs-heartbeat split and Hermes' skill-backed cron jobs while keeping workflow bodies, prompt bodies, issue/comment bodies, tool outputs, credentials, and secret values out of the report.
